title: euphorbia matritensis var. pauciflora
intro: Euphorbia matritensis var. pauciflora, also known as the Spanish dwarf spurge or low-flowering Spanish spurge, is a succulent plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant contains medicinal properties, including the presence of limonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Euphorbia matritensis var. pauciflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its leaves and stems, which can be dried and used to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
